title: phase 2 — publish-cascade for questionnaire + assistant
description:
## Summary

Phase 2 of the coaching knowledge pipeline (spec PR #633, plan PR #636, phase 1 PR #635).

- **DB schema** — new `coaching.templates` (versioned per snippet+surface) + `coaching.template_assignments`. Source pointer JSONB required on every template.
- **Template CRUD** — `coaching-db.ts` extended with createTemplateDraft (auto-incrementing version), updateTemplate, listTemplates with `latestOnly` filter, listTemplateVersions, markTemplatePublished. 5 new pg-mem tests pass.
- **§51 UrhG quote validator** — pure function rejects verbatim runs > 280 chars (case-insensitive, whitespace-tolerant); 6/6 tests pass. Used server-side at publish + client-side live in editor.
- **Cascade module** — `coaching-publish.ts` dispatches per `target_surface`:
  - `questionnaire` → `createQTemplate()` in existing `questionnaire_templates`
  - `assistant` → `ensureCollection('coaching-assistant')` + `addDocument()`
  - `brett`, `chatroom` → store-only (Phase 2b will surface them)
  - 5/5 tests pass via mocked questionnaire-db + knowledge-db
- **API** — six new endpoints under `/api/admin/coaching/*` (templates list/detail/versions, draft-template-from-snippet, publish).
- **UI** — `PublishEditor.svelte` with surface selector + per-surface forms + live preview + quote-warning that disables publish button. New pages at `/admin/knowledge/snippets/[id]/publish` and `/admin/knowledge/templates`. BookReader sidebar appends a `→ Publish` link after snippet creation.
- **E2E** — 5 unauth-path Playwright checks under `tests/e2e/specs/fa-coaching-publish.spec.ts`.

10 commits on this branch.

## Test plan

- [x] vitest: coaching-db (12/12), quote-validator (6/6), coaching-publish (5/5) pass
- [x] Playwright unauth checks present
- [ ] Manual: log in, highlight a snippet, click Publish, choose questionnaire → verify it appears in `/admin/fragebogen` library
- [ ] Manual: publish to assistant → verify a `coaching-assistant` collection exists in `/admin/wissensquellen`
- [ ] Manual: try to publish a verbatim quote > 280 chars → verify the editor disables the publish button

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
